title: How American Eagle is kicking off its deal with the new face of soccer
description: CMO Craig Brommers explains how the retailer’s campaign with Spanish star Lamine Yamal continues a streak of culture-defining moments.
title_en: American Eagle Partners with Soccer Star Lamine Yamal for Culture-Defining Campaign
summary_ko: 아메리칸 이글이 스페인 축구 스타 라민 야말과 파트너십을 체결했습니다. CMO 크레이그 브로머스는 이 캠페인이 문화를 정의하는 순간들의 연속이라고 설명했습니다. 이는 브랜드의 문화적 영향력을 확대하는 전략적 마케팅 움직임입니다.
summary_en: American Eagle has partnered with Spanish soccer star Lamine Yamal in a strategic marketing move. CMO Craig Brommers describes the campaign as continuing a streak of culture-defining moments for the brand. This partnership represents the retailer's effort to expand its cultural influence through sports marketing.
so_what_ko: 스포츠 마케팅을 통한 문화적 영향력 확대는 젊은 소비자층에게 브랜드 어필을 강화할 수 있는 핵심 전략입니다.
so_what_en: Sports marketing for cultural influence expansion is a key strategy for strengthening brand appeal to younger consumer demographics.
key_points: American Eagle partners with rising soccer star Lamine Yamal
Campaign aims to create culture-defining moments
Strategic move to connect with sports and youth culture
one_line_insight_ko: 스포츠 스타 파트너십을 통한 문화적 순간 창조는 젊은 타겟층과의 정서적 연결을 강화하는 핵심 마케팅 전략입니다.
one_line_insight_en: Creating cultural moments through sports star partnerships is a key marketing strategy for strengthening emotional connections with young target audiences.

title: D+ Research: Marketers embrace AI for social and retail media, but show skepticism in AI ad buying
description: For all the chatter about AI’s impact on marketing workflows and outputs, most marketers have yet to embrace the technology for social media and retail media, according to a Digiday+ Research survey.
title_en: Marketers Embrace AI for Social and Retail Media Despite Ad Buying Skepticism
summary_ko: 디지데이 리서치에 따르면 마케터들이 소셜미디어와 리테일미디어에서 AI를 도입하고 있지만 AI 광고 구매에는 회의적입니다. 대부분의 마케터들이 아직 이 기술을 완전히 수용하지 않았다고 조사 결과 나타났습니다. AI의 마케팅 워크플로우 영향에 대한 논의가 활발하지만 실제 채택률은 제한적입니다.
summary_en: According to Digiday+ Research, marketers are adopting AI for social media and retail media but remain skeptical about AI ad buying. The survey reveals that most marketers have not yet fully embraced this technology. Despite active discussions about AI's impact on marketing workflows, actual adoption rates remain limited.
so_what_ko: AI 마케팅 도구 도입 시 단계적 접근이 필요하며, 광고 구매 자동화보다는 콘텐츠 및 소셜미디어 관리부터 시작하는 것이 효과적입니다.
so_what_en: A phased approach is needed for AI marketing tool adoption, starting with content and social media management rather than ad buying automation.
key_points: Marketers show selective AI adoption in social and retail media
Significant skepticism remains around AI-powered ad buying
Gap between AI marketing hype and actual implementation
one_line_insight_ko: 마케터들의 선별적 AI 도입 패턴은 기술 신뢰성과 ROI 증명이 여전히 핵심 과제임을 보여줍니다.
one_line_insight_en: Marketers' selective AI adoption patterns show that technology reliability and ROI proof remain key challenges.

title: Walmart goes global with its Amazon-like flywheel
description: Walmart executives are beginning to take a more international approach to growing the retailer’s higher-margin businesses.
title_en: Walmart Expands Amazon-Like Flywheel Strategy Globally
summary_ko: 월마트 임원들이 아마존과 유사한 플라이휠 모델을 국제적으로 확장하기 시작했습니다. 이는 소매업체의 고수익률 사업 성장을 위한 더욱 국제적인 접근 방식을 취하고 있음을 의미합니다. 월마트가 글로벌 시장에서 아마존에 맞서는 전략적 움직임으로 해석됩니다.
summary_en: Walmart executives are beginning to take a more international approach with their Amazon-like flywheel model. This represents the retailer's strategy to grow higher-margin businesses globally. The move is seen as Walmart's strategic response to compete with Amazon in global markets.
so_what_ko: 글로벌 플라이휠 전략은 데이터, 광고, 마케팅 서비스를 통합한 생태계 구축이 국제 시장 경쟁력 확보의 핵심임을 시사합니다.
so_what_en: Global flywheel strategy indicates that building integrated ecosystems through data, advertising, and marketing services is key for international market competitiveness.
key_points: Walmart adopts Amazon-style flywheel model internationally
Focus on expanding higher-margin business services globally
Strategic move to compete with Amazon's global dominance
one_line_insight_ko: 월마트의 글로벌 플라이휠 확장은 데이터 기반 고수익 서비스 생태계가 현대 리테일의 핵심 경쟁력임을 보여줍니다.
one_line_insight_en: Walmart's global flywheel expansion demonstrates that data-driven high-margin service ecosystems are core competitive advantages in modern retail.

title: The World Cup is a big chance for retail media to prove itself to advertisers
description: The entire retail media industry, from retail media networks to agencies and tech platforms, is showing up in full force to promote brands during the World Cup and prove the effectiveness of the sector.
title_en: World Cup Becomes Major Proving Ground for Retail Media Effectiveness
summary_ko: 월드컵이 리테일미디어 업계가 광고주들에게 자신들의 효과를 입증할 수 있는 큰 기회로 부상했습니다. 리테일미디어 네트워크부터 에이전시, 기술 플랫폼까지 전체 업계가 월드컵 기간 브랜드 홍보에 총력을 기울이고 있습니다. 이는 리테일미디어 섹터의 효과성을 증명하려는 업계 차원의 노력입니다.
summary_en: The World Cup has emerged as a major opportunity for the retail media industry to prove its effectiveness to advertisers. The entire industry, from retail media networks to agencies and tech platforms, is showing up in full force for World Cup brand promotion. This represents an industry-wide effort to demonstrate the effectiveness of the retail media sector.
so_what_ko: 대규모 글로벌 이벤트는 리테일미디어의 타겟팅 정확도와 성과 측정 능력을 검증할 수 있는 핵심 기회이며, D2C 브랜드들도 이러한 순간을 활용해야 합니다.
so_what_en: Major global events are key opportunities to validate retail media's targeting accuracy and performance measurement capabilities, which D2C brands should leverage.
key_points: World Cup serves as proving ground for retail media effectiveness
Industry-wide effort to demonstrate sector capabilities
Opportunity to validate targeting and measurement technologies
one_line_insight_ko: 월드컵은 리테일미디어가 전통 광고 대비 우월한 타겟팅과 측정 능력을 실증할 수 있는 결정적 순간입니다.
one_line_insight_en: The World Cup is a decisive moment for retail media to demonstrate superior targeting and measurement capabilities compared to traditional advertising.

title: Connecticut becomes second state to regulate dynamic pricing
description: The state follows Maryland in enacting legislation that bars retailers from using personally identifiable data to customize prices. A similar bill is awaiting action by New York’s governor.
title_en: Connecticut Becomes Second State to Regulate AI-Powered Dynamic Pricing
summary_ko: 코네티컷주가 개인식별 데이터를 활용한 맞춤형 가격 책정을 금지하는 법안을 제정하며 메릴랜드에 이어 두 번째로 다이나믹 프라이싱을 규제하는 주가 되었습니다. 뉴욕주에서도 유사한 법안이 주지사의 승인을 기다리고 있습니다. 이는 AI 기반 개인화 가격 책정에 대한 규제가 확산되고 있음을 의미합니다.
summary_en: Connecticut has enacted legislation banning retailers from using personally identifiable data for customized pricing, becoming the second state after Maryland to regulate dynamic pricing. A similar bill is awaiting approval from New York's governor. This indicates expanding regulation of AI-powered personalized pricing practices.
so_what_ko: AI 기반 개인화 가격 책정에 대한 규제 확산으로 D2C 브랜드들은 투명한 가격 정책과 대안적 개인화 전략을 개발해야 합니다.
so_what_en: With expanding regulation of AI-powered personalized pricing, D2C brands must develop transparent pricing policies and alternative personalization strategies.
key_points: Connecticut follows Maryland in regulating dynamic pricing
Legislation bans use of personal data for price customization
Growing regulatory trend against AI-powered pricing discrimination
one_line_insight_ko: 개인화 가격 책정 규제 확산은 AI 상거래 전략에서 투명성과 공정성이 새로운 경쟁 우위 요소임을 보여줍니다.
one_line_insight_en: The spread of personalized pricing regulation shows that transparency and fairness are emerging competitive advantages in AI commerce strategies.

title: Bed Bath & Beyond continues acquisition spree
description: The home retailer is building out its services portfolio with an all-stock acquisition of an installation and renovation services company.
title_en: Bed Bath & Beyond Expands Services Portfolio Through Strategic Acquisitions
summary_ko: 베드바스앤비욘드가 전체 주식 교환 방식으로 설치 및 리노베이션 서비스 회사를 인수했습니다. 이번 인수는 홈 서비스 포트폴리오 구축의 일환으로 진행되었습니다. 리테일러가 서비스 부문으로 사업 영역을 확장하는 전략을 보여줍니다.
summary_en: Bed Bath & Beyond acquired an installation and renovation services company through an all-stock transaction. The acquisition is part of building out the retailer's services portfolio. This move demonstrates the company's strategy to expand beyond traditional retail into service offerings.
so_what_ko: 전통적인 제품 판매에서 설치 및 서비스로 확장하는 리테일러의 전략은 D2C 브랜드에게 고객 생애가치 증대와 차별화된 경험 제공의 중요성을 시사합니다.
so_what_en: The retailer's expansion from product sales to installation and services highlights the importance for D2C brands to increase customer lifetime value through comprehensive service offerings and differentiated experiences.
key_points: All-stock acquisition of installation and renovation services company
Expansion of Beyond Home Services division
Strategic move to build comprehensive services portfolio
one_line_insight_ko: 리테일러의 서비스 확장은 제품 중심에서 경험 중심 비즈니스 모델로의 전환을 의미합니다.
one_line_insight_en: Retailer service expansion signifies a shift from product-centric to experience-centric business models.

title: Nike and Adidas take their rivalry to the World Cup. Who will win?
description: The brands are both at a crossroads, and their campaign centerpieces play up soccer bona fides alongside the sport’s stars and other pop icons.
title_en: Nike vs Adidas: World Cup Marketing Battle at Brand Crossroads
summary_ko: 나이키와 아디다스가 월드컵을 배경으로 마케팅 경쟁을 펼치고 있습니다. 두 브랜드 모두 전환점에 서 있는 상황에서 축구 스타와 팝 아이콘을 활용한 캠페인을 선보이고 있습니다. 각 브랜드는 축구와의 연관성을 강조하며 차별화를 시도하고 있습니다.
summary_en: Nike and Adidas are engaged in a marketing rivalry centered around the World Cup. Both brands are at crossroads and leveraging soccer stars and pop culture icons in their campaigns. Each brand emphasizes their soccer credentials while seeking differentiation in the competitive landscape.
so_what_ko: 글로벌 스포츠 이벤트를 활용한 브랜드 경쟁은 D2C 기업에게 문화적 순간을 포착하고 인플루언서 마케팅을 통한 브랜드 차별화의 중요성을 보여줍니다.
so_what_en: Brand competition around global sports events demonstrates the importance for D2C companies to capture cultural moments and leverage influencer marketing for brand differentiation.
key_points: Both brands at strategic crossroads using World Cup marketing
Campaigns feature soccer stars and pop culture icons
Competition emphasizes soccer authenticity and brand heritage
one_line_insight_ko: 글로벌 이벤트 마케팅은 브랜드 정체성과 문화적 연관성 구축의 핵심 전략입니다.
one_line_insight_en: Global event marketing is a key strategy for building brand identity and cultural relevance.

title: Bed Bath & Beyond to acquire Installed Right and SFV Services
description:
Bed Bath & Beyond announced June 9 that it will acquire Installed Right and SFV Services, a 20-year-old company for construction and facilities management projects. The move expands Beyond Home Services, a division of Bed Bath & Beyond, the retailer said. Bed Bath & Beyond said its acquisition of Installed Right and SFV Services adds […]
The post Bed Bath & Beyond to acquire Installed Right and SFV Services appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
title_en: Bed Bath & Beyond Acquires Construction Services Companies to Expand Home Services
summary_ko: 베드바스앤비�ond가 20년 역사의 건설 및 시설 관리 회사인 Installed Right와 SFV Services를 인수한다고 발표했습니다. 이번 인수는 Beyond Home Services 부문을 확장하는 움직임입니다. 리테일러가 홈 서비스 영역으로 사업을 다각화하는 전략을 보여줍니다.
summary_en: Bed Bath & Beyond announced the acquisition of Installed Right and SFV Services, a 20-year-old construction and facilities management company. The move expands the Beyond Home Services division of the retailer. This demonstrates the company's strategy to diversify into home services offerings.
so_what_ko: 전통 리테일러의 서비스 사업 확장은 D2C 브랜드에게 제품 판매를 넘어선 통합적 고객 솔루션 제공의 중요성을 시사합니다.
so_what_en: Traditional retailers expanding into services signals the importance for D2C brands to provide comprehensive customer solutions beyond product sales.
key_points: Acquisition of 20-year-old construction and facilities management company
Expansion of Beyond Home Services division
Strategic diversification into home services sector
one_line_insight_ko: 리테일 기업의 서비스업 진출은 고객 접점 확대와 수익 다각화 전략의 핵심입니다.
one_line_insight_en: Retailers entering service sectors is key to expanding customer touchpoints and revenue diversification.

title: United Natural Foods sales fall in Q3 as distributor continues digital, AI pushes
description:
United Natural Foods Inc. reached profitability in its fiscal Q3 ended May 2, even as sales fell year over year to 4.2%. Still, the distributor’s leadership expressed confidence in its continuing efforts to advance digital and artificial intelligence (AI) solutions for the grocers that it serves. “Through disciplined execution of our strategy, we generated strong […]
The post United Natural Foods sales fall in Q3 as distributor continues digital, AI pushes appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
title_en: United Natural Foods Pushes Digital and AI Solutions Despite Q3 Sales Decline
summary_ko: United Natural Foods는 3분기 매출이 전년 대비 4.2% 감소했음에도 불구하고 수익성을 달성했습니다. 유통업체는 서비스하는 식료품점들을 위한 디지털 및 AI 솔루션 발전에 지속적으로 투자하고 있습니다. 경영진은 전략적 실행을 통해 강력한 성과를 창출했다고 표현했습니다.
summary_en: United Natural Foods achieved profitability in Q3 despite a 4.2% year-over-year sales decline. The distributor continues advancing digital and AI solutions for the grocers it serves. Leadership expressed confidence in disciplined strategy execution generating strong performance.
so_what_ko: 매출 감소 상황에서도 AI와 디지털 솔루션에 투자하는 유통업체의 사례는 D2C 기업에게 기술 투자를 통한 장기적 경쟁력 확보의 중요성을 보여줍니다.
so_what_en: A distributor investing in AI and digital solutions despite sales decline demonstrates the importance for D2C companies to secure long-term competitiveness through technology investments.
key_points: Q3 profitability achieved despite 4.2% sales decline
Continued investment in digital and AI solutions for grocery partners
Leadership confidence in strategic execution and performance
one_line_insight_ko: 매출 하락기에도 AI 투자를 지속하는 것은 미래 경쟁력 확보를 위한 필수 전략입니다.
one_line_insight_en: Continuing AI investments during sales decline is essential strategy for securing future competitiveness.

title: Kawasaki Engines USA grows B2B ecommerce sales AOV by 500%
description:
For manufacturer Kawasaki Engines USA, growing B2B ecommerce sales in the past decade started with unifying data from legacy systems. Kawasaki Engines USA manufactures products tied to motorcycles, jet skis, robotics, aerospace and more. Anthony Gondick, senior manager of IT business strategy at Kawasaki Engines USA, explained how the manufacturer upgraded its B2B ecommerce experience […]
The post Kawasaki Engines USA grows B2B ecommerce sales AOV by 500% appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
title_en: Kawasaki Engines USA Achieves 500% B2B Ecommerce AOV Growth Through Data Unification
summary_ko: Kawasaki Engines USA는 지난 10년간 B2B 이커머스 평균 주문가치를 500% 증가시켰습니다. 성장의 시작점은 레거시 시스템의 데이터 통합이었습니다. 오토바이, 제트스키, 로보틱스, 항공우주 등 다양한 제품을 제조하는 회사가 B2B 이커머스 경험을 업그레이드한 사례입니다.
summary_en: Kawasaki Engines USA grew B2B ecommerce average order value by 500% over the past decade. The growth started with unifying data from legacy systems. The manufacturer produces products for motorcycles, jet skis, robotics, and aerospace, and upgraded its B2B ecommerce experience.
so_what_ko: 레거시 시스템 데이터 통합을 통한 500% AOV 성장 사례는 D2C 기업에게 데이터 기반 최적화와 시스템 현대화의 강력한 비즈니스 임팩트를 입증합니다.
so_what_en: The 500% AOV growth through legacy data unification proves the powerful business impact of data-driven optimization and system modernization for D2C companies.
key_points: 500% growth in B2B ecommerce average order value over decade
Success started with unifying data from legacy systems
Manufacturer upgraded B2B ecommerce experience across diverse product lines
one_line_insight_ko: 데이터 통합은 B2B 이커머스에서 극적인 성과 개선을 위한 핵심 전략입니다.
one_line_insight_en: Data unification is the key strategy for dramatic performance improvement in B2B ecommerce.

title: AI email marketing tools: Our top picks for 2026
description: Marketers are turning to AI-powered tools to scale relevance without increasing manual effort as inbox competition increases and performance expectations rise. AI email marketing tools are rapidly reshaping how teams execute and measure email campaigns. AI advances now support everything from subject line creation and personalization to send-time optimization and revenue attribution.
title_en: AI Email Marketing Tools Transform Campaign Execution and Performance Measurement for 2026
summary_ko: 마케터들이 경쟁이 치열해진 이메일 환경에서 수동 작업 증가 없이 개인화 규모를 확대하기 위해 AI 기반 도구로 전환하고 있습니다. AI 이메일 마케팅 도구는 제목 라인 생성부터 개인화, 발송 시간 최적화, 수익 기여도 분석까지 전 과정을 지원합니다. 이러한 AI 발전은 이메일 캠페인 실행과 측정 방식을 근본적으로 변화시키고 있습니다.
summary_en: Marketers are adopting AI-powered tools to scale personalization without increasing manual effort as email competition intensifies. AI email marketing tools now support comprehensive campaign management from subject line creation and personalization to send-time optimization and revenue attribution. These AI advances are fundamentally reshaping how marketing teams execute and measure email campaigns.
so_what_ko: LG D2C는 AI 이메일 마케팅 도구를 활용하여 개인화된 고객 소통을 자동화하고 캠페인 성과를 실시간으로 최적화해야 합니다.
so_what_en: LG D2C should leverage AI email marketing tools to automate personalized customer communications and optimize campaign performance in real-time.
key_points: AI tools enable scaling personalized email marketing without manual effort increase
Comprehensive AI support from subject lines to revenue attribution tracking
Rising inbox competition drives need for AI-powered optimization
one_line_insight_ko: AI 이메일 마케팅 도구는 개인화 규모 확대와 성과 측정을 동시에 혁신하여 D2C 브랜드의 경쟁력을 강화합니다.
one_line_insight_en: AI email marketing tools simultaneously revolutionize personalization scaling and performance measurement, strengthening D2C brand competitiveness.

title: Schema markup for AEO: How to implement it to boost answer engine visibility in 2026
description: Schema markup for AEO helps answer engines understand a website. Schema is readable by AI crawlers because it’s added to a site’s HTML. It allows SEO professionals to add additional context and map entities without overwhelming the website’s front end or users. This additional context provided by schema reduces ambiguity and increases the likelihood that the web content can be accurately cited in AI-generated answers.
title_en: Schema Markup Implementation Boosts Answer Engine Visibility for AI-Driven Search in 2026
summary_ko: AEO를 위한 스키마 마크업은 답변 엔진이 웹사이트를 이해할 수 있도록 돕는 핵심 기술입니다. AI 크롤러가 읽을 수 있는 HTML 구조화 데이터를 통해 추가 컨텍스트를 제공하고 모호성을 줄입니다. 이는 AI 생성 답변에서 웹 콘텐츠가 정확히 인용될 가능성을 크게 높입니다.
summary_en: Schema markup for AEO helps answer engines understand websites through structured data readable by AI crawlers. It provides additional context in HTML format, reducing ambiguity without overwhelming users or front-end experience. This implementation significantly increases the likelihood of accurate content citation in AI-generated answers.
so_what_ko: LG D2C는 제품 정보와 브랜드 콘텐츠에 스키마 마크업을 적용하여 AI 검색 환경에서의 가시성과 정확한 정보 전달을 보장해야 합니다.
so_what_en: LG D2C must implement schema markup for product information and brand content to ensure visibility and accurate information delivery in AI search environments.
key_points: Schema markup enables AI crawlers to understand website content structure
Reduces content ambiguity for more accurate AI-generated answer citations
Critical for visibility in emerging answer engine optimization (AEO)
one_line_insight_ko: 스키마 마크업은 AI 검색 시대에서 브랜드 콘텐츠의 정확한 발견과 인용을 위한 필수 기술적 투자입니다.
one_line_insight_en: Schema markup is essential technical investment for accurate brand content discovery and citation in the AI search era.

title: Nike and Adidas take their rivalry to the World Cup. Who will win?
description: The brands are both at a crossroads, and their campaign centerpieces play up soccer bona fides alongside the sport’s stars and other pop icons.
title_en: Nike and Adidas Intensify Brand Rivalry Through World Cup Marketing Campaigns
summary_ko: 나이키와 아디다스가 월드컵을 무대로 브랜드 경쟁을 펼치고 있습니다. 두 브랜드 모두 기로에 서 있으며, 축구 스타들과 팝 아이콘들을 활용한 캠페인으로 축구에 대한 진정성을 어필하고 있습니다. 이번 마케팅 대결은 글로벌 스포츠 마케팅의 새로운 기준을 제시할 것으로 예상됩니다.
summary_en: Nike and Adidas are taking their brand rivalry to the World Cup stage with competing marketing campaigns. Both brands are at crossroads, leveraging soccer stars and pop culture icons to demonstrate their soccer authenticity. This marketing battle is expected to set new standards for global sports marketing.
so_what_ko: LG는 글로벌 스포츠 이벤트를 활용한 브랜드 경쟁 전략과 셀러브리티 파트너십의 중요성을 학습하여 자사 제품 마케팅에 응용해야 합니다.
so_what_en: LG should learn from global sports event brand competition strategies and celebrity partnerships to apply these insights to their product marketing.
key_points: Major brands leveraging World Cup for competitive brand positioning
Integration of sports stars and pop culture icons in campaign strategies
Both brands at strategic crossroads requiring differentiated approaches
one_line_insight_ko: 글로벌 스포츠 이벤트는 브랜드 차별화와 감정적 연결을 위한 핵심 마케팅 전장입니다.
one_line_insight_en: Global sports events serve as critical marketing battlegrounds for brand differentiation and emotional connection.

title: How New CMO Jill Cress Is Pushing Babylist Past the Registry
description: Financial marketing vet aims to create a holistic parenting platform as Babylist prepares to IPO
title_en: Babylist CMO Jill Cress Expands Platform Beyond Registry Ahead of IPO
summary_ko: 베이비리스트의 새로운 CMO 질 크레스가 회사를 단순한 베이비 레지스트리를 넘어 종합적인 육아 플랫폼으로 확장하고 있습니다. 금융 마케팅 전문가인 크레스는 IPO 준비와 함께 플랫폼의 전략적 방향성을 재정의하고 있습니다. 이러한 변화는 육아 관련 서비스의 통합적 접근 방식을 보여줍니다.
summary_en: Babylist's new CMO Jill Cress is expanding the company beyond a simple baby registry into a comprehensive parenting platform. The financial marketing veteran is redefining the platform's strategic direction while preparing for IPO. This transformation demonstrates an integrated approach to parenting-related services.
so_what_ko: LG D2C는 단일 제품 카테고리에서 시작하여 고객 라이프스타일 전반을 아우르는 플랫폼으로 확장하는 전략을 참고해야 합니다.
so_what_en: LG D2C should consider strategies for expanding from single product categories to comprehensive lifestyle platforms that serve broader customer needs.
key_points: Strategic platform expansion beyond core registry service
Leadership transition driving comprehensive parenting ecosystem development
IPO preparation requiring broader market positioning
one_line_insight_ko: 전문 영역에서 시작한 플랫폼이 고객 전체 여정을 포괄하는 생태계로 진화하는 것이 성장의 핵심입니다.
one_line_insight_en: Evolving from specialized platforms to comprehensive customer journey ecosystems is key to sustainable growth.

title: OpenAI tests multi-advertiser ad placements in ChatGPT
description:
OpenAI is testing multi-advertiser placements in ChatGPT while adding new targeting and campaign tools that expand its ad platform.
The post OpenAI tests multi-advertiser ad placements in ChatGPT appeared first on MarTech.
title_en: OpenAI Expands ChatGPT Ad Platform with Multi-Advertiser Placements and Enhanced Targeting
summary_ko: OpenAI가 ChatGPT에서 멀티 광고주 배치를 테스트하며 광고 플랫폼을 확장하고 있습니다. 새로운 타겟팅과 캠페인 도구가 추가되어 광고 플랫폼의 기능이 대폭 강화되었습니다. 이는 AI 대화형 인터페이스가 새로운 광고 매체로 부상하고 있음을 보여줍니다.
summary_en: OpenAI is testing multi-advertiser placements in ChatGPT while expanding its advertising platform capabilities. New targeting and campaign tools significantly enhance the platform's advertising functionality. This demonstrates AI conversational interfaces emerging as new advertising mediums.
so_what_ko: LG D2C는 ChatGPT와 같은 AI 대화형 플랫폼에서의 광고 기회를 선제적으로 탐색하고 새로운 고객 접점을 확보해야 합니다.
so_what_en: LG D2C should proactively explore advertising opportunities on AI conversational platforms like ChatGPT to secure new customer touchpoints.
key_points: Multi-advertiser placement testing expands ChatGPT monetization
Enhanced targeting and campaign tools improve advertiser capabilities
AI conversational interfaces becoming viable advertising channels
one_line_insight_ko: AI 대화형 플랫폼이 새로운 광고 채널로 부상하며 브랜드-고객 상호작용의 패러다임을 변화시키고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: AI conversational platforms are emerging as new advertising channels, transforming the paradigm of brand-customer interactions.
